self = <selenium.webdriver.support.wait.WebDriverWait (session="0cad31b2ed904342d2014d8aaf88ffff")> method = <function element_to_be_clickable.<locals>._predicate at 0x7f98165316c0> message = ''
def until(self, method: Callable[[D], Literal[False] | T], message: str = "") -> T: """Wait until the method returns a value that is not False.
Calls the method provided with the driver as an argument until the return value does not evaluate to ``False``.
Args: method: A callable object that takes a WebDriver instance as an argument. message: Optional message for TimeoutException.
Returns: The result of the last call to `method`.
Raises: TimeoutException: If 'method' does not return a truthy value within the WebDriverWait object's timeout.
Example: >>> from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By >>> from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait >>> from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC >>> >>> # Wait until an element is visible on the page >>> wait = WebDriverWait(driver, 10) >>> element = wait.until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.ID, "exampleId"))) >>> print(element.text) """ screen = None stacktrace = None
end_time = time.monotonic() + self._timeout while True: try: value = method(self._driver) if value: return value except self._ignored_exceptions as exc: screen = getattr(exc, "screen", None) stacktrace = getattr(exc, "stacktrace", None) if time.monotonic() > end_time: break time.sleep(self._poll) > raise TimeoutException(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: E Stacktrace: E Symbols not available. Dumping unresolved backtrace: E 0xde6663 E 0xde66a4 E 0xc11d20 E 0xc5c19a E 0xc5c43b E 0xc9de72 E 0xc7ea84 E 0xc9b661 E 0xc7e7d6 E 0xc4ffd9 E 0xc50d94 E 0x106e6d4 E 0x10699a5 E 0x1086550 E 0xe00358 E 0xe07e5d E 0xdef128 E 0xdef2f2 E 0xdd892a E 0x76815d49 E 0x7744cebb E 0x7744ce41

self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7f9816decc80> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f981691a5d0>
def test_evite_rsvp_free(self, config): """ New Creation Flow with Fabric Templates
Create Event, RSVP guests, Yes, No. Email and/or Phone.
Verify guest in Guest List Verify RSVP in Manage Invitation Dashboard
:param config: :return: """
_test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3])
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] invitation_page = config.pages["evite_view_invitation"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav(action="create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(actions=["free"]) evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page.select_random_template()
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time()
if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="details")
# Step 2: Enter Details page step2_event_details.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) step1_template.select_next(url="gifting") step1_template.select_next(url="preview") step1_template.select_next(url="send") evite_event_page.skip_ads()
> config.pages["evite_event_confirmation"].select_confirmation_button(action="add_guests")
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_free' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f981691a5d0> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7f981691a750> evite_event_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_page.EviteEventPage object at 0x7f98169186e0> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7f9816df87d0> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f9816919130> host = 'automation test' invitation_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation.EviteViewInvitation object at 0x7f98169184a0> logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_free (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f981691aa50> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f981691b800> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f9816918fe0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7f98182fb500> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7f9816dbfe60> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7f9816919df0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7f9816decc80> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7f9816918bc0> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7f9816918770> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f981691b830> user_email_addr = 'evite-03102026-140405-71-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7f98169181d0>

self = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_confirmation.EviteEventConfirmationPage object at 0x7f9816918ce0> locator = ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="addGuestsButton"]'), timeout = 15
def click(self, locator, timeout=15): """ Waits for an element to be clickable and then clicks it. Also retries the click if the element becomes stale. """ retries = 3
for i in range(retries): try: elem = WebDriverWait(self.selenium, timeout).until(ec.element_to_be_clickable(locator)) try: elem.click() self.logger.info("Clicked: %s", locator) return except ElementClickInterceptedException: self.logger.warning("ElementClickInterceptedException: %s. Trying .click() again...", locator) if i == retries - 1: raise except StaleElementReferenceException: self.logger.warning("StaleElementReferenceException: %s. Trying .click() again...", locator) if i == retries - 1: raise except TimeoutException as e: current_url = self.selenium.current_url exception_msg = str(e)
if "Timed out receiving message from renderer" in exception_msg: msg = f"RENDERER ISSUE DETECTED: Browser hung at {current_url} after clicking {locator}" self.logger.error(msg) raise TimeoutException(msg) from e else: msg = f"Timed out waiting for element: {locator} at URL: {current_url}" self.logger.error(msg) > raise ElementNotFoundError(msg) from e E utils.exceptions.ElementNotFoundError: Timed out waiting for element: ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="addGuestsButton"]') at URL: https://test4.evitelabs.com/invitation/0307IIAE4SKDAANGEEPRDTCMEFJIXA/send?template=vintage-jello-jenna-obrien&event_type=featured&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&=undefined&pos=14

Dumping unresolved backtrace:\n\t0xde6663\n\t0xde66a4\n\t0xc11d20\n\t0...5\n\t0x1086550\n\t0xe00358\n\t0xe07e5d\n\t0xdef128\n\t0xdef2f2\n\t0xdd892a\n\t0x76815d49\n\t0x7744cebb\n\t0x7744ce41\n' i = 0 locator = ('css selector', '[data-qa-id="addGuestsButton"]') msg = 'Timed out waiting for element: (\'css selector\', \'[data-qa-id="addGuestsButton"]\') at URL: https://test4.evitelabs...IXA/send?template=vintage-jello-jenna-obrien&event_type=featured&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&=undefined&pos=14' retries = 3 self = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_confirmation.EviteEventConfirmationPage object at 0x7f9816918ce0> timeout = 15
